name: ModelViewer
description: A Three.js-powered 3D model viewer with mouse parallax, hover rotation, environment lighting, auto-framing, and screenshot support. Loads glTF/GLB, FBX, and OBJ formats.

url.description: URL of the 3D model file (glTF, GLB, FBX, or OBJ format).

width.description: Width of the viewer canvas in pixels or CSS value.

height.description: Height of the viewer canvas in pixels or CSS value.

modelXOffset.description: Horizontal position offset of the model.

modelYOffset.description: Vertical position offset of the model.

defaultRotationX.description: Initial X rotation of the model in degrees.

defaultRotationY.description: Initial Y rotation of the model in degrees.

enableMouseParallax.description: Enable subtle camera movement following the mouse cursor.

enableHoverRotation.description: Enable rotation effect when hovering over the model.

environmentPreset.description: Environment lighting preset for reflections and illumination.

autoRotate.description: Enable continuous auto-rotation of the model.

fadeIn.description: Fade in the model after loading.

showScreenshotButton.description: Show a button to capture a screenshot of the current view.

autoFrame.description: Automatically frame the model to fit the viewport.

onModelLoaded.description: Callback fired when the model finishes loading.

examples.title: Interactive product viewer
examples.code:
<ModelViewer
  url="/models/shoe.glb"
  width={600}
  height={500}
  enableMouseParallax
  enableHoverRotation
  autoRotate
  autoRotateSpeed={0.2}
  environmentPreset="sunset"
  fadeIn
/>

aiPromptHint: ModelViewer requires a 'url' prop pointing to a 3D model file. Supports glTF/GLB (preferred), FBX, and OBJ. Use environmentPreset to change lighting. The component renders its own canvas — no wrapper needed.
